title: vepris inermis
intro: Vepris inermis, also known as the African yellow ironwood, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vepris inermis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
